Localization.Description: Suspicious logon via Keycloak. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received a Keycloak security token on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} received a Keycloak security token to access new resource {object.application.name} on host {event_src.host}. The resource is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} received a Keycloak security token on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
